text: Very professional and friendly team, led by Darko. I would recommend Vertebra to everyone.

translations.sr: Veoma profesionalan i ljubazan tim, na čelu sa Darkom. Preporučio bih Vertebra svakome.
translations.sr_cyrl: Веома професионалан и љубазан тим, на челу са Дарком. Препоручио бих Vertebra свакоме.
translations.en: Very professional and friendly team, led by Darko. I would recommend Vertebra to everyone.
translations.ru: Очень профессиональная и дружелюбная команда во главе с Darko. Я бы рекомендовал Vertebra всем.
translations.de: Sehr professionelles und freundliches Team unter der Leitung von Darko. Ich würde Vertebra jedem empfehlen.
translations.tr: Darko önderliğinde çok profesyonel ve arkadaş canlısı bir ekip. Vertebra'yı herkese tavsiye ederim.
